SELECT fromDaysSinceYearZero(365) AS date, fromDaysSinceYearZero(0) AS start_date;
SELECT fromDaysSinceYearZero(days) FROM (SELECT number AS days FROM numbers(10000));
SELECT fromDaysSinceYearZero(days) AS date, toDate('2023-09-08') AS comparison_date FROM dates_test WHERE days > 365;
WITH (SELECT fromDaysSinceYearZero(739136)) AS computed_date SELECT computed_date, now() AS current_time;
CREATE TABLE another_dates_test AS (SELECT days, fromDaysSinceYearZero(days) AS date FROM dates_test);
SELECT date FROM another_dates_test WHERE date = fromDaysSinceYearZero(365);
SELECT days, (SELECT fromDaysSinceYearZero(days) FROM another_dates_test WHERE days = 0) AS zero_date FROM another_dates_test;
